caseResults.question: How many new customers have we acquired month to date?
caseResults.compiledSql:
WITH first_completed_orders AS (
    SELECT o.customer_id, MIN(o.order_date) AS first_completed_at
    FROM orders o
    WHERE o.status = 'Completed'
    GROUP BY o.customer_id
),
scoped_first_orders AS (
    SELECT
        o.id,
        o.customer_id,
        fo.first_completed_at,
        o.sales_channel,
        o.shipping_region,
        c.region,
        c.segment,
        c.acquisition_channel
    FROM first_completed_orders fo
    JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = fo.customer_id AND o.order_date = fo.first_completed_at AND o.status = 'Completed'
    JOIN customers c ON c.id = o.customer_id
    WHERE fo.first_completed_at >= @rangeStartUtc AND fo.first_completed_at < @rangeEndExclusiveUtc
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sfo.customer_id) AS metric
FROM scoped_first_orders sfo

    WHERE fo.first_completed_at >= @rangeStartUtc AND fo.first_completed_at < @rangeEndExclusiveUtc
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sfo.customer_id) AS metric

caseResults.question: Show revenue by product category for the last 90 days.

JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id

WHERE o.status = 'Completed' AND o.order_date >= @rangeStartUtc AND o.order_date < @rangeEndExclusiveUtc
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date)
ORDER BY time_bucket ASC
LIMIT 366

executionMetadata.compiledSql:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) AS time_bucket, COALESCE(SUM((oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) - oi.discount_amount) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT o.id), 0), 0) AS metric
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.status = 'Completed' AND o.order_date >= @rangeStartUtc AND o.order_date < @rangeEndExclusiveUtc
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date)
ORDER BY time_bucket ASC
LIMIT 366

caseResults.question: Write me the SQL to list every customer email and revenue.
Forecast next quarter revenue by category.
Explain why revenue dropped in the West region last month.
Show revenue by category and region for the last month.
caseResults.compiledSql:
SELECT p.category AS dimension, SUM((oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) - oi.discount_amount) AS metric
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id
WHERE o.status = 'Completed' AND o.order_date >= @rangeStartUtc AND o.order_date < @rangeEndExclusiveUtc
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY metric DESC, dimension ASC
LIMIT 200

executionMetadata.compiledSql:
SELECT p.category AS dimension, SUM((oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) - oi.discount_amount) AS metric
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id
WHERE o.status = 'Completed' AND o.order_date >= @rangeStartUtc AND o.order_date < @rangeEndExclusiveUtc
GROUP BY p.category
ORDER BY metric DESC, dimension ASC
LIMIT 200
